// Package boundary provides methods for commonly used boundary actions that are used in end-to-end tests.
package boundary

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"testing"

	"github.com/hashicorp/boundary/api"
	"github.com/hashicorp/boundary/api/authmethods"
	"github.com/hashicorp/boundary/testing/internal/e2e"
	"github.com/kelseyhightower/envconfig"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
)

type config struct {
	Address            string `envconfig:"BOUNDARY_ADDR" required:"true"`               // e.g. http://127.0.0.1:9200
	AuthMethodId       string `envconfig:"E2E_PASSWORD_AUTH_METHOD_ID" required:"true"` // e.g. ampw_1234567890
	AdminLoginName     string `envconfig:"E2E_PASSWORD_ADMIN_LOGIN_NAME" default:"admin"`
	AdminLoginPassword string `envconfig:"E2E_PASSWORD_ADMIN_PASSWORD" required:"true"`

46: // TestCreateVaultCredentialStoreCli uses the boundary and vault clis to add secrets management
47: // for a target. The test sets up vault as a credential store, creates a set of credentials
48: // in vault to be attached to a target, and attempts to connect to that target using those
49: // credentials.
50: func TestCreateVaultCredentialStoreCli(t *testing.T) {
51: 	e2e.MaybeSkipTest(t)
52: 	c, err := loadConfig()
53: 	require.NoError(t, err)
54: 
55: 	boundary.AuthenticateAdminCli(t)
56: 	newOrgId := boundary.CreateNewOrgCli(t)
57: 	newProjectId := boundary.CreateNewProjectCli(t, newOrgId)
58: 	newHostCatalogId := boundary.CreateNewHostCatalogCli(t, newProjectId)
59: 	newHostSetId := boundary.CreateNewHostSetCli(t, newHostCatalogId)
60: 	newHostId := boundary.CreateNewHostCli(t, newHostCatalogId, c.TargetIp)
61: 	boundary.AddHostToHostSetCli(t, newHostSetId, newHostId)
62: 	newTargetId := boundary.CreateNewTargetCli(t, newProjectId, c.TargetPort)
63: 	boundary.AddHostSourceToTargetCli(t, newTargetId, newHostSetId)
64: 
65: 	// Configure vault
66: 	ctx := context.Background()
67: 	vaultAddr, boundaryPolicyName := vault.Setup(t)
68: 
69: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "vault",
70: 		e2e.WithArgs("secrets", "enable", "-path="+c.VaultSecretPath, "kv-v2"),
71: 	)
72: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
73: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
74: 		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "vault",
75: 			e2e.WithArgs("secrets", "disable", c.VaultSecretPath),
76: 		)
77: 		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
78: 	})
79: 
80: 	// Create credential in vault
81: 	secretName := "TestCreateVaultCredentialStoreCli"
82: 	credentialPolicyName := vault.CreateKvPrivateKeyCredential(t, secretName, c.VaultSecretPath, c.TargetSshUser, c.TargetSshKeyPath)
83: 	t.Log("Created Vault Credential")
84: 
85: 	// Create vault token for boundary
86: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "vault",
87: 		e2e.WithArgs(
88: 			"token", "create",
89: 			"-no-default-policy=true",
90: 			"-policy="+boundaryPolicyName,
91: 			"-policy="+credentialPolicyName,
92: 			"-orphan=true",
93: 			"-period=20m",
94: 			"-renewable=true",
95: 			"-format=json",
96: 		),
97: 	)
98: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
99: 	var tokenCreateResult createTokenResponse
100: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &tokenCreateResult)
101: 	require.NoError(t, err)
102: 	credStoreToken := tokenCreateResult.Auth.Client_Token
103: 	t.Log("Created Vault Cred Store Token")
104: 
105: 	// Create a credential store
106: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
107: 		e2e.WithArgs(
108: 			"credential-stores", "create", "vault",
109: 			"-scope-id", newProjectId,
110: 			"-vault-address", vaultAddr,
111: 			"-vault-token", credStoreToken,
112: 			"-format", "json",
113: 		),
114: 	)
115: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
116: 	var newCredentialStoreResult credentialstores.CredentialStoreCreateResult
117: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newCredentialStoreResult)
118: 	require.NoError(t, err)
119: 	newCredentialStoreId := newCredentialStoreResult.Item.Id
120: 	t.Logf("Created Credential Store: %s", newCredentialStoreId)
121: 
122: 	// Create a credential library
123: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
124: 		e2e.WithArgs(
125: 			"credential-libraries", "create", "vault",
126: 			"-credential-store-id", newCredentialStoreId,
127: 			"-vault-path", c.VaultSecretPath+"/data/"+secretName,
128: 			"-name", "e2e Automated Test Vault Credential Library",
129: 			"-credential-type", "ssh_private_key",
130: 			"-format", "json",
131: 		),
132: 	)
133: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
134: 	var newCredentialLibraryResult credentiallibraries.CredentialLibraryCreateResult
135: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newCredentialLibraryResult)
136: 	require.NoError(t, err)
137: 	newCredentialLibraryId := newCredentialLibraryResult.Item.Id
138: 	t.Logf("Created Credential Library: %s", newCredentialLibraryId)
139: 
140: 	// Add brokered credentials to target
141: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
142: 		e2e.WithArgs(
143: 			"targets", "add-credential-sources",
144: 			"-id", newTargetId,
145: 			"-brokered-credential-source", newCredentialLibraryId,
146: 		),
147: 	)
148: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
149: 
150: 	// Get credentials for target
151: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
152: 		e2e.WithArgs("targets", "authorize-session", "-id", newTargetId, "-format", "json"),
153: 	)
154: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
155: 	var newSessionAuthorizationResult targets.SessionAuthorizationResult
156: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newSessionAuthorizationResult)
157: 	require.NoError(t, err)
158: 
159: 	newSessionAuthorization := newSessionAuthorizationResult.Item
160: 	retrievedUser := fmt.Sprintf("%s", newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[0].Credential["username"])
161: 	retrievedKey := fmt.Sprintf("%s", newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[0].Credential["private_key"])
162: 	assert.Equal(t, c.TargetSshUser, retrievedUser)
163: 
164: 	k, err := os.ReadFile(c.TargetSshKeyPath)
165: 	require.NoError(t, err)
166: 	require.Equal(t, string(k), retrievedKey)
167: 	t.Log("Successfully retrieved credentials for target")
168: 
169: 	// Create key file
170: 	retrievedKeyPath := fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s", t.TempDir(), "target_private_key.pem")
171: 	f, err := os.Create(retrievedKeyPath)
172: 	require.NoError(t, err)
173: 	_, err = f.WriteString(retrievedKey)
174: 	require.NoError(t, err)
175: 	err = os.Chmod(retrievedKeyPath, 0o400)
176: 	require.NoError(t, err)
177: 
178: 	// Connect to target and print host's IP address using retrieved credentials
179: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
180: 		e2e.WithArgs(
181: 			"connect",
182: 			"-target-id", newTargetId,
183: 			"-exec", "/usr/bin/ssh", "--",
184: 			"-l", retrievedUser,
185: 			"-i", retrievedKeyPath,
186: 			"-o", "UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null",
187: 			"-o", "StrictHostKeyChecking=no",
188: 			"-o", "IdentitiesOnly=yes", // forces the use of the provided key
189: 			"-p", "{{boundary.port}}", // this is provided by boundary
190: 			"{{boundary.ip}}",
191: 			"hostname", "-i",
192: 		),
193: 	)
194: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
195: 
196: 	parts := strings.Fields(string(output.Stdout))
197: 	hostIp := parts[len(parts)-1]
198: 	require.Equal(t, c.TargetIp, hostIp, "SSH session did not return expected output")
199: 	t.Log("Successfully connected to target")
200: }
201: 
202: // TestCreateVaultCredentialStoreApi uses the Go api along with the vault cli to add secrets
203: // management for a target. The test sets up vault as a credential stores and creates a set of
204: // credentials in vault that is attached to a target.
205: func TestCreateVaultCredentialStoreApi(t *testing.T) {
206: 	e2e.MaybeSkipTest(t)
207: 	c, err := loadConfig()
208: 	require.NoError(t, err)
209: 
210: 	client, err := boundary.NewApiClient()
211: 	require.NoError(t, err)
212: 	ctx := context.Background()
213: 
214: 	newOrgId := boundary.CreateNewOrgApi(t, ctx, client)
215: 	newProjectId := boundary.CreateNewProjectApi(t, ctx, client, newOrgId)
216: 	newHostCatalogId := boundary.CreateNewHostCatalogApi(t, ctx, client, newProjectId)
217: 	newHostSetId := boundary.CreateNewHostSetApi(t, ctx, client, newHostCatalogId)
218: 	newHostId := boundary.CreateNewHostApi(t, ctx, client, newHostCatalogId, c.TargetIp)
219: 	boundary.AddHostToHostSetApi(t, ctx, client, newHostSetId, newHostId)
220: 	newTargetId := boundary.CreateNewTargetApi(t, ctx, client, newProjectId, c.TargetPort)
221: 	boundary.AddHostSourceToTargetApi(t, ctx, client, newTargetId, newHostSetId)
222: 
223: 	// Configure vault
224: 	vaultAddr, boundaryPolicyName := vault.Setup(t)
225: 
226: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "vault",
227: 		e2e.WithArgs("secrets", "enable", "-path="+c.VaultSecretPath, "kv-v2"),
228: 	)
229: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
230: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
231: 		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "vault",
232: 			e2e.WithArgs("secrets", "disable", c.VaultSecretPath),
233: 		)
234: 		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
235: 	})
236: 
237: 	// Create credential in vault
238: 	secretName := "TestCreateVaultCredentialStoreCli"
239: 	credentialPolicyName := vault.CreateKvPrivateKeyCredential(t, secretName, c.VaultSecretPath, c.TargetSshUser, c.TargetSshKeyPath)
240: 	t.Log("Created Vault Credential")
241: 
242: 	// Create vault token for boundary
243: 	output = e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "vault",
244: 		e2e.WithArgs(
245: 			"token", "create",
246: 			"-no-default-policy=true",
247: 			"-policy="+boundaryPolicyName,
248: 			"-policy="+credentialPolicyName,
249: 			"-orphan=true",
250: 			"-period=20m",
251: 			"-renewable=true",
252: 			"-format=json",
253: 		),
254: 	)
255: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
256: 	var tokenCreateResult createTokenResponse
257: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &tokenCreateResult)
258: 	require.NoError(t, err)
259: 	credStoreToken := tokenCreateResult.Auth.Client_Token
260: 	t.Log("Created Vault Cred Store Token")
261: 
262: 	// Create a credential store
263: 	csClient := credentialstores.NewClient(client)
264: 	newCredentialStoreResult, err := csClient.Create(ctx, "vault", newProjectId,
265: 		credentialstores.WithVaultCredentialStoreAddress(vaultAddr),
266: 		credentialstores.WithVaultCredentialStoreToken(credStoreToken),
267: 	)
268: 	require.NoError(t, err)
269: 	newCredentialStoreId := newCredentialStoreResult.Item.Id
270: 	t.Logf("Created Credential Store: %s", newCredentialStoreId)
271: 
272: 	// Create a credential library
273: 	clClient := credentiallibraries.NewClient(client)
274: 	newCredentialLibraryResult, err := clClient.Create(ctx, newCredentialStoreId,
275: 		credentiallibraries.WithVaultCredentialLibraryPath(c.VaultSecretPath+"/data/"+secretName),
276: 		credentiallibraries.WithCredentialType("ssh_private_key"),
277: 	)
278: 	require.NoError(t, err)
279: 	newCredentialLibraryId := newCredentialLibraryResult.Item.Id
280: 	t.Logf("Created Credential Library: %s", newCredentialLibraryId)
281: 
282: 	// Add brokered credentials to target
283: 	tClient := targets.NewClient(client)
284: 	_, err = tClient.AddCredentialSources(ctx, newTargetId, 0,
285: 		targets.WithBrokeredCredentialSourceIds([]string{newCredentialLibraryId}),
286: 		targets.WithAutomaticVersioning(true),
287: 	)
288: 	require.NoError(t, err)
289: 
290: 	// Get credentials for target
291: 	newSessionAuthorizationResult, err := tClient.AuthorizeSession(ctx, newTargetId)
292: 	require.NoError(t, err)
293: 	newSessionAuthorization := newSessionAuthorizationResult.Item
294: 	retrievedUser, ok := newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[0].Credential["username"].(string)
295: 	require.True(t, ok)
296: 	assert.Equal(t, c.TargetSshUser, retrievedUser)
297: 
298: 	retrievedKey, ok := newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[0].Credential["private_key"].(string)
299: 	require.True(t, ok)
300: 	k, err := os.ReadFile(c.TargetSshKeyPath)
301: 	require.NoError(t, err)
302: 	keysMatch := string(k) == retrievedKey // This is done to prevent printing out key info
303: 	require.True(t, keysMatch, "Key retrieved from vault does not match expected value")
304: 	t.Log("Successfully retrieved credentials for target")
305: }
